description: CompositionGreen high ankle canvas shoes with upper made of canvas, vulcanized rubber outsole with an overlaid toe, cushioned insole and comes with an additional pair of lacesCare1. Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washA true lifestyle shoe, this green pair from numero uno is the apt footwear for casual dressing. The durable canvas upper enables ventilation and absorbs sweat, making it an ideal footwear for the warmer months. It has a cushioned insole to comfort your feet while you indulge in long leisure walks, while the scratched rubber outsole with a ridged outline provides great grip. The high traction rubber outsole coupled with an overlaid toe box provides additional style and protection, while the soft padded insole with a cambreel lining provides excellent arch support. To add on is the padded collar, high ankle and laces that together provide a snug Fit. Whats more, you get an additional pair of laces in green which you can interchange with the white ones to suit your dress. So, get retro now and flaunt this canvas pair with much elan.Warranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
